name: J1939TestOutputBAM
title: J1939TestOutputBAM
syntax: long J1939TestOutputBAM( pg txMsg, dword seqNum, dword seqCount, dword delay, [dword options], [dword optionArg] )
description: With this function the transmission of a message with the BAM transport protocol is influenced. It can created errors during transmission, i.e. violate time distances or wrong sequence numbers.

parameters.name: txMsg
parameters.description: send this parameter group with BAM

parameters.name: seqNum
parameters.description: start with this sequence number, number 0 is the BAM message

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: optional Bit 0: Do not wait after last message Bit 1: Use number of packets for BAM message from optionArg

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
